choices.name: CathlicCommunity
choices.choiceText: I am a member of the Roman Catholic community

choices.name: NeitherCommunity
choices.choiceText: I am not a member of either the Protestant or Roman Catholic community

choices.name: ProtestantCommunity
choices.choiceText: I am a member of the Protestant community

decisions.description: Has candidate completed the NI Fair Employment questionnaire before. If they have, display as read only content. If they haven't, continue to gather information.
decisions.name: Fair_Employment_Completed
decisions.label: Community Background Completed

recordCreates.description: Create a new community background check certificate
recordCreates.name: CreateNewCommunityBackgroundCert
recordCreates.label: CreateNewCommunityBackgroundCert

screens.description:
We are an Equal Opportunities Employer. We do not unlawfully discriminate against our job applicants or employees and we aim to select the best person for the job.
We monitor the community background and sex of our job applicants and employees in order to demonstrate our commitment to promoting equality of opportunity in employment and to comply with our duties under the Fair Employment & Treatment (NI) Order 1998.
Your answers will be used by us to prepare and submit a monitoring return to the Equality Commission, but your identity will be kept anonymous. In all other regards your answers will be treated with the strictest confidence. We assure you that your answers will not be used by us to make any decisions affecting you, whether in a recruitment exercise or during the course of any employment with us.
screens.name: Fair_Employment_Monitoring_Questionnaire
screens.label: Fair Employment Monitoring Questionnaire

fields.name: Community_Backround
fields.fieldText:
Fair Employment Monitoring Questionnaire


We are an Equal Opportunities Employer. We do not unlawfully discriminate against our job applicants or employees and we aim to select the best person for the job.


We monitor the community background and sex of our job applicants and employees in order to demonstrate our commitment to promoting equality of opportunity in employment and to comply with our duties under the Fair Employment & Treatment (NI) Order 1998.


Your answers will be used by us to prepare and submit a monitoring return to the Equality Commission, but your identity will be kept anonymous. In all other regards your answers will be treated with the strictest confidence. We assure you that your answers will not be used by us to make any decisions affecting you, whether in a recruitment exercise or during the course of any employment with us.


Community Background:

Regardless of whether they actually practice a religion, most people in Northern Ireland are perceived to be members of either the Protestant or Roman Catholic communities.


Please indicate the community to which you belong by ticking the appropriate box below:

screens.description:
Fair Employment Monitoring Questionnaire
We are an Equal Opportunities Employer. We do not unlawfully discriminate against our job applicants or employees and we aim to select the best person for the job.
We monitor the community background and sex of our job applicants and employees in order to demonstrate our commitment to promoting equality of opportunity in employment and to comply with our duties under the Fair Employment & Treatment (NI) Order 1998.
Your answers will be used by us to prepare and submit a monitoring return to the Equality Commission, but your identity will be kept anonymous. In all other regards your answers will be treated with the strictest confidence. We assure you that your answers will not be used by us to make any decisions affecting you, whether in a recruitment exercise or during the course of any employment with us.
Community Background:
Regardless of whether they actually practice a religion, most people in Northern Ireland are perceived to be members of either the Protestant or Roman Catholic communities.
Please indicate the community to which you belong by ticking the appropriate box below:
screens.name: Fair_Employment_Read_Only
screens.label: Fair Employment Read Only

fields.name: FairEmploymentQuestionnaireReadOnly
fields.fieldText:
Fair Employment Monitoring Questionnaire


We are an Equal Opportunities Employer. We do not unlawfully discriminate against our job applicants or employees and we aim to select the best person for the job.


We monitor the community background and sex of our job applicants and employees in order to demonstrate our commitment to promoting equality of opportunity in employment and to comply with our duties under the Fair Employment & Treatment (NI) Order 1998.


Your answers will be used by us to prepare and submit a monitoring return to the Equality Commission, but your identity will be kept anonymous. In all other regards your answers will be treated with the strictest confidence. We assure you that your answers will not be used by us to make any decisions affecting you, whether in a recruitment exercise or during the course of any employment with us.


Community Background:

Regardless of whether they actually practice a religion, most people in Northern Ireland are perceived to be members of either the Protestant or Roman Catholic communities.


Please indicate the community to which you belong by ticking the appropriate box below: 

  • {!GetCertificateRecord.Community_Background__c}
